params.description: Animated Minis characters appear collecting items. Four categories visible: Red, Blue, Green, and Yellow Minis.

beats.text: The Minis are collecting items! Help count what they found.

params.description: Student counts items across categories. Results: Red Minis 20, Blue Minis 40, Green Minis 30, Yellow Minis 50. Values display as multiples of 10 with clear differences.

beats.text: You counted the items. That's a lot! Let's see how to show this data.

elements.description: Completed counting game showing results. Red Minis: 20, Blue Minis: 40, Green Minis: 30, Yellow Minis: 50.
